name: Collard Greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the smoked ham hocks in a 5-quart pot with the water. Heat to boiling, then reduce to a simmer. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes, skimming foam from the broth once or twice.
2. Prepare the collard greens by cutting away the very thick stem parts. Wash thoroughly and drain excess water. Chop into small pieces. Stir into the pot and add salt, red pepper, sugar, and bacon drippings. Cook, covered, at a simmer until tender (about 20 minutes).
3. Turn off heat. Check seasonings. Cover and let sit for a few minutes before serving.
